hooks.command: filepath=$(echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | jq -r '.file_path // empty'); case "$filepath" in *.env|*.env.*) echo 'BLOCK: Do not edit .env files directly. Ask the user to update environment variables manually.' >&2; exit 1;; esac; exit 0

filepath=$(echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | jq -r '.file_path // empty'); case "$filepath" in */app/src/*.ts|*/app/src/*.tsx|*/app/src/*.js|*/app/src/*.jsx) cd /home/daniel-bo/Desktop/mediarr && npx eslint --fix "$filepath" 2>/dev/null; exit 0;; esac; exit 0
